name: CBLOCK
description: C-code block for custom continuous dynamics (2 continuous states)

descriptions: Name of C function file (without extension)

explicitInputs.description: Input signal to custom C function

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CBLOCK" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName=" " simulationFunctionType="DYNAMIC_EXPLICIT_4" style="CBLOCK">
  <Array as="exprs" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="14" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="toto"/>
      <data line="1" column="0" value="n"/>
      <data line="2" column="0" value="1"/>
      <data line="3" column="0" value="1"/>
      <data line="4" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="5" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="6" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="7" column="0" value="0"/>
      <data line="8" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="9" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="10" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="11" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="12" column="0" value="y"/>
      <data line="13" column="0" value="n"/>
    </ScilabString>
    <ScilabDouble height="0" width="0"/>
  </Array>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="300.0" y="200.0" width="80.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: exprs is ScilabList (nested structure) - highly unusual
Empty realParameters and integerParameters - all params in exprs
criticalRules: First exprs element is the C function file name
User must provide C code in external file
exprs is nested ScilabList with ScilabString inside
